description: Implementation + quality validation for a pre-planned feature

tasks.title: Create Task model and database schema
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Task model with title, description, priority, due date, assignee fields

tasks.title: Implement task CRUD API endpoints
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: REST endpoints for create, read, update, delete tasks

tasks.title: Build task creation form component
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Form with validation, priority selector, date picker, assignee dropdown

tasks.title: Implement real-time WebSocket updates
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Task changes broadcast to all connected clients within 2 seconds

tasks.title: Build task board dashboard view
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Kanban board with drag-and-drop, filtering, and sorting

tasks.title: Write unit and integration tests
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: 80% coverage with passing unit and integration tests

requirements.description: Users can create tasks with title, description, priority, and due date
Tasks can be assigned to team members
Real-time updates when tasks are modified

customChecks.name: accessibility
customChecks.description: All interactive elements have ARIA labels
